zh.Utrecht, Utrecht, Netherlands: 荷蘭武特雷特武特雷特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje於1569年出生在荷蘭藍德時，他的父親Jacobus Abraham Loosje37歲，母親Maretje Janszen39歲。他於1590年9月與Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen在荷蘭藍德文-德貝藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1618年9月在他的家鄉享年49歲。

zh-hans.Utrecht, Utrecht, Netherlands: 荷兰武特雷特武特雷特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje于1569年出生在荷兰藍德时，他的父亲Jacobus Abraham Loosje37岁，母亲Maretje Janszen39岁。他于1590年9月与Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen在荷兰藍德文-德貝藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1618年9月在他的家乡享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Losea
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: habitational name from any of several places called Loose (see   Loose  ) or Loosey. This name was established in the Hudson valley in the 18th century.

variants.name: Loose
meanings: English: habitational name from Loose in Kent or Suffolk, both named from Old English hlōse ‘pigsty’.
Flemish (De Loose) and Dutch: variant of Loos 3.

nameMeanings.name: Loosje
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Loose in Kent or Suffolk, both named from Old English hlōse ‘pigsty’.
Flemish (De Loose) and Dutch: variant of Loos 3.

variants.name: Loos
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Loose or Loosey.
North German: from a short form of Nikolaus, German form of Nicholas .
Flemish and Dutch: nickname from the adjective loos ‘cunning, artful, guileful’.

variants.name: Losee
meanings: North German: habitational name from any of several places called Loose (see   Loose  ) or Loosey. This name was established in the Hudson valley in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: Jacobus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical name Yaakov; see Jacob .

historicEvents.description: William of Orange was recognized as viceroy of Holland, Friesland and Utrecht.
The siege of Leiden between the rebels and the Spanish. 1574 The dikes were opened allowing a Dutch fleet to sail over the flood waters and rescue Leiden.

William of Orange (1533-1584), Prince of Orange (1538-1584), Count of Nassau (1559-1584), and first stadholder of the United Provinces of the Netherlands, was assassinated by Burgundian Balthasar Gerard (25) with a handgun. Philip II of Spain had called for a volunteer assassin due to William's reluctance take a public stand on religious issues. William was succeeded by his 17-year-old son, Maurice of Nassau.
Britain waged wars against the Dutch.
"The United East India Company (V.O.C.), destined to become a powerful force in Holland's ""Golden Age""of discovery, exploration, and trade, is founded."
"English navigator Henry Hudson, under contract to the United East India Company, sails from Amsterdam and ""discovers""Manhattan Island and the future site of New York."

Henry Hudson sailed into the river that now bears his name. English explorer Henry Hudson sailed into the river that now bears his name. Hudson sailed for the Dutch East India Company in search of the Northwest Passage, a water route linking the Atlantic and Pacific Oceans, when he sailed up the present-day Hudson River.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje was born in 1569, in Zeeland, Netherlands, his father, Jacobus Abraham Loosje, was 37 and his mother, Maretje Janszen, was 39. He married Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen in September 1590, in Schouwen-Duiveland, Zeeland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in September 1618, in his hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje est né en 1569, à Zélande, Pays-Bas, son père, Jacobus Abraham Loosje, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Maretje Janszen, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen en septembre 1590, à Schouwen-Duiveland, Zélande, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en septembre 1618, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje 1569 in Seeland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jacobus Abraham Loosje 37 und seine Mutter Maretje Janszen 39. Er hat im September 1590 in Schouwen-Duiveland, Seeland, Niederlande Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb im September 1618 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje è nato il nel 1569 nel Zelanda, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Jacobus Abraham Loosje, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Maretje Janszen, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen nel settembre 1590, nel Schouwen-Duiveland, Zelanda, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel settembre 1618, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.Zierikzee, Schouwen-Duiveland, Zeeland,: オランダゼエランドスチオウウエン-ドウイベランド
ja.Utrecht, Utrecht, Netherlands: オランダウトレチトウトレチト
ja.lifeSummary: Henri Jacobus Losea Loosjeが1569年にオランダゼエランドで生まれた時，父Jacobus Abraham Loosjeは37歳，母Maretje Janszenは39歳であった。1590年9月にオランダゼエランドスチオウウエン-ドウイベランドでMajaretta Gertstad Van Essenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1618年9月に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje(이)가 1569년 네덜란드 제랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jacobus Abraham Loosje(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Maretje Janszen(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1590년 9월 네덜란드 제랜드 슈우웬-드이벨랜드에서 Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1618년 9월 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje nasceu em 1569, em Zelandia, Países Baixos, seu pai, Jacobus Abraham Loosje, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Maretje Janszen, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen em setembro de 1590, em Schouwen-Duiveland, Zelandia, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1618, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje родился в 1569 г. в местности зиланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Jacobus Abraham Loosje было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Maretje Janszen, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen сентябрь 1590 г. в местности щоувен-дуивеланд, зиланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер сентябрь 1618 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri Jacobus Losea Loosje nació en 1569, en Zeeland, Países Bajos, su papá, Jacobus Abraham Loosje, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Maretje Janszen, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Majaretta Gertstad Van Essen en septiembre de 1590, en Schouwen-Duiveland, Zeeland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en septiembre de 1618, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años.
